  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Hot work is being conducted directly over an uncovered sewer or drain.",
    "Accumulation of flammable vapors or combustible materials in the drain poses an immediate explosion hazard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all hot work immediately.",
    "Cover and seal the sewer/drain with a fire-resistant cover or shield.",
    "Test the atmosphere in and around the drain for flammable vapors before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Conducting hot work over an unprotected sewer or drain violates basic fire prevention standards. Sparks or slag can ignite flammable gases or accumulated debris within the drainage system, creating a severe explosion or fire hazard. Work must be halted immediately until the drain is properly covered and the area is cleared of hazards.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 51B Section 5.6.1",
    "OSHA 1926.352"
  ]
}
